creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-03-16 22:10:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    news                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    news/lottanzb        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  LottaNZB is a graphical usenet frontend utilizing hellanzb
  that simplifies the retrieval of binary news.
  
  WWW: http://www.lottanzb.org
  
  PR:             ports/131332
  Submitted by:   Zach Thompson <hideo at lastamericanempire.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.136     +1 -0      ports/news/Makefile
  1.1       +39 -0     ports/news/lottanzb/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/news/lottanzb/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/news/lottanzb/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +379 -0    ports/news/lottanzb/pkg-plist (new)
